privileged_info_summary: Emma Thompson is the Product Manager at Northbridge (verified from setup_data.py). The task requires creating a 'Product Launch Kickoff' event with 3 attendees: two engineering leads (David Chen, Luis Fernandez) and the marketing manager (Carol Martinez). The meeting must be set at 'Engineering Lab' with an agenda description and must delete the existing 'Sprint Planning - Engineering' event. Pass threshold is 70/100.
